title: Kan Rendum Lyrics Poriyaalan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Kan Rendum
Singer(s): G.V.Prakash Kumar, Saindhavi
Music: M.S.Jones
Movie: Poriyaalan

Kan rendum nee varaththaaney
kaaththu kidandhadhu
un vuzhi paadhai paarthu kidandhadhu
en anbae, vaa mubae.

Kaaththaadi polave en nenjamey
en kaigalil adhu thanjamey
indha naal adi indha naal
en idhayathil kadandhu varum.

Kan rendum nee varaththaaney
kaaththu kidandhadhu
un vuzhi paadhai paarthu kidandhadhu
en anbae, vaa mubae.

Aan manam veli kkaatti pesum
pen manam thirai moodi pesum
poovukkul irunkindra vaasam
kattrukku kadithangal veesum

Adi mouwnaththin mozhigale
kadhalin mugavari
manam indru ariginradhe

Edhu varai enai kootti povaai
adhu varai udan serndhu varuven
ulagaththai marandhodi povom
kanavil midhandhodi povom

Kan rendum nee varaththaaney
kaaththu kidandhadhu
un vuzhi paadhai paarthu kidandhadhu
en anbae, vaa mubae.

Kaaththaadi polave en nenjamey
en kaigalil adhu thanjamey
indha naal adi indha naal
en idhayathil kadandhu varum.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kan Rendum?

The song revolves around themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions of waiting and anticipation.

Who are the singers of Kan Rendum?

The song is sung by GV Prakash Kumar and Saindhavi.

Who composed the music for Poriyaalan?

The music for the movie was composed by M.S. Jones.

What is the release year of the movie Poriyaalan?

The movie was released in the year 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kan Rendum is a melodious duet from the movie Poriyaalan, capturing the essence of love and longing. The song portrays the emotions of waiting for a loved one, with soothing music by M.S. Jones. Sung by GV Prakash Kumar and Saindhavi, it evokes a sense of calm and romance. The lyrics beautifully express the anticipation and joy of being with someone special.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kan Rendum from the movie Poriyaalan is a captivating duet that beautifully blends the soothing vocals of GV Prakash Kumar and Saindhavi. With M.S. Jones's enchanting music, this song creates a romantic and calming atmosphere. Dive into the mesmerizing world of Kan Rendum and experience the magic of love and longing.
stanzaMeanings: I waited with both eyes for you to come, watching your path, my dear, come forward.
Like a kite, my heart finds shelter in my hands, today, today it will pass through my heart.
I waited with both eyes for you to come, watching your path, my dear, come forward.
A man's heart speaks openly, a woman's heart speaks behind a screen, the fragrance inside a flower sends messages to the wind.
The language of silence is the address of love, the heart understands it today.
Until where will you take me, I will come with you until then, let's forget the world and run away, let's wander in dreams.
Again and again, my heart likes to lose to you.
I waited with both eyes for you to come, watching your path, my dear, come forward.
Like a kite, my heart finds shelter in my hands, today, today it will pass through my heart.
